hero.headline: No traffic. No stress. Just pure relaxation
hero.description: No hidden fees. No additional travel charges. Each session includes the comforts of a luxury spa experience — aromatherapy, hot stones, a heated table, and your preferred pressure — delivered right to you.

about.bio: Monica is a licensed massage therapist (MA79268) specializing in mobile luxury massage therapy in the Orlando area. She brings the full spa experience directly to your accommodation, so you can focus on pure relaxation.
about.focus: From Swedish relaxation to Deep Tissue, Prenatal, Lymphatic Drainage, Oncology Massage, Traditional Lomi Lomi, and Sports Massage — each session is tailored to your needs.
about.stats: Every session includes the comforts of a luxury spa experience —
about.rating: aromatherapy, hot stones, a heated table
about.statsClose: , and your preferred pressure, all included in the price.

footer.blurb: Providing mobile luxury massage therapy services to the Orlando area. Off-Disney property accommodations only.

serviceAreaBlurb: Available for off-Disney property accommodations only. Monica serves the greater Orlando area, bringing the luxury spa experience directly to your door — no traffic, no stress.

features.title: Seasoned Practitioner
features.description: Certified with over 10 years of experience

tiers.title: 60-Minute Massage
features: Focus on 1–2 specific areas of tension (e.g., neck, shoulders, or back)
Good for stress relief and general relaxation
Enough time for a focused therapeutic session or a lighter full-body pass

tiers.title: 90-Minute Massage
features: Balanced full-body massage with extra focus on 2–3 problem areas
Ideal for combining relaxation and deeper therapeutic work
Time to address chronic tightness while still covering the whole body

tiers.title: 120-Minute Massage
features: Comprehensive full-body massage with detailed work on multiple areas
Best choice for chronic pain, athletes, or deeper restorative sessions
Allows slow, thorough treatment without rushing any part of the body

pricing.note: All-inclusive. No hidden fees. No additional travel charges.
pricing.pageLead: Transparent pricing for all our massage sessions. No hidden fees.
notes: Available for off-Disney property accommodations only.
